violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Store raw meats away from ready to eat foods in refrigerator and prep table cooler.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Detail cleaning needed.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Store wiping cloth bucket out of hand sink.
